property.name: Foxwoods Resort Casino
property.description: One of the largest casino resort complexes in North America, Foxwoods Resort Casino is owned and operated by the Mashantucket Pequot Tribal Nation. The resort features six casinos, four hotel towers, a world-class spa, over 30 dining options, championship golf, outlet shopping, and the renowned Foxwoods Poker Room with over 100 tables.

restaurants.name: David Burke Prime
restaurants.description: Celebrity chef David Burke's premium steakhouse featuring USDA Prime dry-aged steaks, creative seafood, and signature dishes like the clothesline bacon. An upscale dining experience with an extensive wine list.

restaurants.name: Al Dente
restaurants.description: Authentic Italian cuisine featuring handmade pastas, wood-fired specialties, and classic Italian dishes prepared with fresh ingredients. Warm atmosphere with traditional Italian decor.

restaurants.name: Golden Dragon
restaurants.description: Traditional and contemporary Chinese cuisine including dim sum, Cantonese specialties, and Szechuan dishes. Features a large menu with authentic regional preparations.

restaurants.name: Cedars Steakhouse
restaurants.description: Classic steakhouse offering premium cuts of beef, fresh seafood, and traditional sides. Located in the Grand Pequot Tower with an elegant atmosphere and attentive service.

restaurants.name: Hard Rock Cafe
restaurants.description: The iconic rock-and-roll themed restaurant serving classic American fare including burgers, ribs, and fajitas. Features rock memorabilia, live music, and a lively atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Festival Buffet
restaurants.description: All-you-can-eat buffet featuring international stations including Asian, Italian, American, seafood, and carving stations. Rotating seasonal specialties and themed events.

restaurants.name: High Rollers Luxury Lanes & Lounge
restaurants.description: Upscale bowling experience combined with a full-service restaurant and bar. Features gourmet comfort food, craft cocktails, and VIP bowling lanes in a modern lounge setting.

restaurants.name: Lucky Star Ramen
restaurants.description: Authentic Japanese ramen shop serving rich tonkotsu, miso, and shoyu broths with handmade noodles. Also features gyoza, rice bowls, and Japanese appetizers.

restaurants.name: Sugar Factory
restaurants.description: Instagram-famous restaurant and candy shop known for its over-the-top milkshakes, signature goblet cocktails, and American menu. A sweet and savory dining experience with vibrant decor.

restaurants.name: Fox Diner
restaurants.description: Classic 24-hour diner serving breakfast all day, burgers, sandwiches, comfort food, and late-night favorites. The go-to spot for a quick meal at any hour.

entertainment.name: Grand Theater
entertainment.description: Premier concert and event venue hosting major headliner acts, comedy shows, boxing, and special events. Features state-of-the-art sound and lighting with excellent sightlines from every seat.
entertainment.schedule: Events vary; check foxwoods.com/entertainment for schedule

entertainment.name: Fox Theater
entertainment.description: Intimate theater venue hosting concerts, comedy shows, and special performances. Features comfortable seating with cocktail service and excellent acoustics.

entertainment.name: The Atrium
entertainment.description: Upscale nightclub and lounge featuring top DJs, themed parties, craft cocktails, and a vibrant nightlife atmosphere. Must be 21+ to enter.
entertainment.schedule: Friday and Saturday nights, 10:00 PM - 2:00 AM

entertainment.name: Monza World-Class Karting
entertainment.description: High-speed indoor go-kart racing experience on a European-style track. Features electric karts reaching speeds up to 45 MPH, suitable for adults and children (height requirements apply).
entertainment.schedule: Daily, hours vary; check foxwoods.com for availability

entertainment.name: Foxwoods Bowling Center
entertainment.description: Modern bowling center with multiple lanes, cosmic bowling nights, and a full-service snack bar. Fun for the whole family with league play and open bowling available.

entertainment.name: Rainmaker Statue & Museum
entertainment.description: The iconic Rainmaker statue stands in the grand atrium of the resort. The nearby Mashantucket Pequot Museum and Research Center (separate facility) offers exhibits on Pequot tribal history and Native American culture.

hotel.overview: Foxwoods Resort Casino offers four hotel towers with a combined total of approximately 1,716 rooms and suites, ranging from luxury high-rise towers to a convenient budget-friendly option.

towers.name: Grand Pequot Tower
towers.description: The flagship hotel tower featuring spacious, modern rooms with elegant furnishings and panoramic views of the surrounding Connecticut woodlands. Home to the resort's premier dining venues.

towers.name: Great Cedar Hotel
towers.description: Contemporary hotel tower with upscale rooms and suites offering a fresh, modern aesthetic. Features direct access to the casino floor and resort amenities.

towers.name: Fox Tower
towers.description: Stylish hotel tower with boutique-inspired rooms and suites. Features modern decor, premium amenities, and convenient access to the resort's entertainment and dining options.

towers.name: Two Trees Inn
towers.description: Budget-friendly hotel option located adjacent to the main resort complex. Offers comfortable, well-appointed rooms at an accessible price point. Free shuttle service to the main casino.

room_types.name: Deluxe Room
room_types.description: Comfortable room with king or two queen beds, modern furnishings, and views of the Connecticut countryside. Includes flat-screen TV, mini-fridge, in-room safe, and complimentary Wi-Fi.

room_types.name: Superior Room
room_types.description: Enhanced room with premium bedding, upgraded amenities, and preferred floor location. Features a sitting area and enhanced bathroom amenities.

room_types.name: Junior Suite
room_types.description: Spacious suite with separate living area, king bed, sofa bed, and expanded bathroom. Ideal for extended stays or families.

room_types.name: Penthouse Suite
room_types.description: Luxurious suite with separate bedroom and living room, wet bar, dining area, premium entertainment system, and panoramic views. VIP concierge service included.

amenities.name: G Spa
amenities.description: Full-service spa offering a comprehensive menu of treatments including massages, facials, body wraps, and wellness therapies. Features a tranquil relaxation lounge, steam room, sauna, and premium skincare services.

amenities.name: Indoor Pool
amenities.description: Heated indoor pool with adjacent hot tub, available to hotel guests. Features poolside lounge chairs and towel service in a relaxing environment.

amenities.name: Fitness Center
amenities.description: State-of-the-art fitness center with cardio equipment, free weights, strength machines, and personal training available. Complimentary for hotel guests.

amenities.name: Tanger Outlets at Foxwoods
amenities.description: Over 70 brand-name outlet stores and specialty shops offering fashion, accessories, jewelry, home goods, and more. Located within the Foxwoods resort complex for convenient shopping between gaming and dining.

amenities.name: Pequot Museum
amenities.description: The Mashantucket Pequot Museum and Research Center is located nearby and offers award-winning exhibits on the history and culture of the Mashantucket Pequot Tribal Nation and Native American peoples of the region.

amenities.name: Lake of Isles Golf Course
amenities.description: Championship 36-hole golf facility located nearby, featuring two 18-hole courses designed by Rees Jones. Includes a full pro shop, driving range, and golf instruction.

gaming.description: Foxwoods Resort Casino features one of the largest casino floors in North America with 344,000 square feet of gaming space. The resort offers an enormous variety of slot machines, table games, and one of the largest poker rooms in the world.

areas.name: Grand Pequot Casino
areas.description: The main gaming floor featuring a wide selection of slot machines, table games, and high-limit areas. Connected to the Grand Pequot Tower.

areas.name: Rainmaker Casino
areas.description: Additional gaming floor with slot machines and table games in a vibrant atmosphere.

areas.name: Fox Tower Casino
areas.description: Modern gaming floor located in the Fox Tower area, featuring the latest slot machines and electronic table games.

poker_room_details.name: Foxwoods Poker Room
poker_room_details.tournaments: Daily tournaments with varying buy-ins; hosts major tournament series including WPT events
poker_room_details.description: One of the largest poker rooms in the world featuring 104 tables. Hosts major tournament series, daily cash games at all stakes, and regular special events. A destination for poker players worldwide.

sportsbook_details.name: Book at Foxwoods
sportsbook_details.description: Full-service sportsbook featuring a massive LED video wall, individual betting stations, comfortable lounge seating, and full bar service. Offers betting on professional and college sports through DraftKings partnership.
sportsbook_details.hours: Daily, hours vary by sport season

high_limit_areas.description: VIP high-limit gaming areas available for table games and slots with elevated minimum bets, premium drink service, and dedicated hosts.
high_limit_areas.minimum_bets: Vary by game and time of day

promotions.name: Foxwoods Rewards
promotions.description: Foxwoods' official loyalty rewards program. Earn points by playing slots, table games, and poker, as well as through hotel stays, dining, and entertainment purchases. Points can be redeemed for free play, dining, hotel stays, and retail purchases.

tiers.name: Premier
tiers.description: Entry level. Earn points on all gaming and resort spending.

tiers.name: Platinum
tiers.description: Enhanced rewards, priority access, and select event invitations.

tiers.name: Diamond
tiers.description: Premium benefits including complimentary valet, room upgrades, and exclusive events.

tiers.name: Chairman
tiers.description: By invitation only. The highest tier with full VIP treatment, personalized service, and exclusive access.

promotions.how_to_join: Free to join. Sign up at any Foxwoods Rewards desk, online at foxwoods.com, or through the Foxwoods app.

promotions.name: Foxwoods App
promotions.description: Download the Foxwoods mobile app to manage your rewards account, view promotions, check your points balance, book hotel rooms, browse restaurants, and see upcoming entertainment events. Available on iOS and Android.

promotions.name: Hotel Packages
promotions.description: Various seasonal hotel packages combining room stays with dining credits, spa treatments, or entertainment tickets. Check foxwoods.com for current offers.

promotions.name: Dining Rewards
promotions.description: Foxwoods Rewards members earn points on all dining purchases at participating Foxwoods restaurants. Special dining promotions and discounts available throughout the year.

faq.question: What are the casino hours?
faq.answer: Foxwoods Resort Casino is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.

faq.question: What is the minimum gambling age?
faq.answer: You must be 21 years of age or older to gamble or consume alcohol at Foxwoods Resort Casino.

faq.question: Is there free parking?
faq.answer: Yes, Foxwoods offers free self-parking in multiple garage locations throughout the resort. Valet parking is also available for a fee.

faq.question: Is there a dress code?
faq.answer: The casino floor has no formal dress code. Upscale restaurants like David Burke Prime and Cedars Steakhouse recommend business casual attire. Nightclub venues may have specific dress codes.

faq.question: How do I get to Foxwoods?
faq.answer: Foxwoods Resort Casino is located at 350 Trolley Line Boulevard, Mashantucket, CT 06338. It is accessible by car via I-95 to Route 2. The resort also offers bus service from various cities in the Northeast through Foxwoods Express bus packages.

faq.question: Does Foxwoods allow smoking?
faq.answer: Connecticut state law prohibits smoking inside public buildings. Foxwoods is entirely smoke-free indoors. Designated outdoor smoking areas are available.

faq.question: Is Foxwoods pet-friendly?
faq.answer: Standard hotel rooms do not allow pets. Please contact the hotel directly for information on any pet-friendly accommodation options and policies.

faq.question: How do I join the Foxwoods Rewards program?
faq.answer: Joining is free! Sign up at any Foxwoods Rewards desk on the casino floor, online at foxwoods.com, or through the Foxwoods mobile app. You'll receive your rewards card immediately.

faq.question: What is the check-in and check-out time?
faq.answer: Standard check-in time is 4:00 PM and check-out time is 11:00 AM. Early check-in and late check-out may be available based on room availability. Higher-tier Foxwoods Rewards members may receive complimentary late check-out.

faq.question: Does Foxwoods have a pool?
faq.answer: Yes, Foxwoods has a heated indoor pool and hot tub available to hotel guests. The pool area is open daily from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM.

faq.question: Are there ATMs at Foxwoods?
faq.answer: Yes, ATMs are located throughout the casino floor and near the hotel lobbies. Please note that transaction fees may apply.

faq.question: Does Foxwoods have a responsible gaming program?
faq.answer: Yes, Foxwoods is committed to responsible gaming. The resort provides resources for guests who may need assistance, including self-exclusion options through the Connecticut Department of Consumer Protection (ct.gov/selfexclusion, phone: 1-860-713-6300). For help, call the National Problem Gambling Helpline at 1-800-522-4700 or the Connecticut Council on Problem Gambling at 1-888-789-7777.

faq.question: Can I host a private event at Foxwoods?
faq.answer: Yes, Foxwoods offers extensive event and convention space including ballrooms, meeting rooms, and conference facilities. Contact the events team at foxwoods.com for more information.

faq.question: Is there a shuttle service to Foxwoods?
faq.answer: Foxwoods offers bus service from various cities in the Northeast through Foxwoods Express bus packages. Routes operate from New York City, Boston, Hartford, Providence, and other major cities. Contact 1-800-369-9663 or visit foxwoods.com for current schedules and pricing.

faq.question: What is the Foxwoods Poker Room?
faq.answer: The Foxwoods Poker Room features 104 tables, making it one of the largest poker rooms in the world. It offers daily tournaments, cash games at all stakes, and hosts major tournament series including WPT events. The poker room is open 24 hours a day.
